enum_values.name: TextureSummary
enum_values.summary: Texture UI includes an auto texture summary section. See AddAutoParameters().

enum_values.name: QuickPreview
enum_values.summary: Editor displays an instant preview before preview cycle begins.

enum_values.name: PreviewCache
enum_values.summary: Content's preview imagery can be stored in the preview cache.

enum_values.name: ProgressivePreview
enum_values.summary: Content's preview imagery can be rendered progressively.

enum_values.name: LocalTextureMapping
enum_values.summary: Texture UI includes an auto local mapping section for textures. See AddAutoParameters()

enum_values.name: GraphDisplay
enum_values.summary: Texture UI includes a graph section.

enum_values.name: NameTypeSection
enum_values.summary: Render content UI includes a 'Name' and 'Type' section.

enum_values.name: SharedUI
enum_values.summary: Obsolete. OBSOLETE: The UI is always shared between render contents of the same type id.

enum_values.name: Adjustment
enum_values.summary: Texture UI includes an adjustment section.

enum_values.name: Fields
enum_values.summary: Render content uses fields to facilitate data storage and undo support. See Fields()

enum_values.name: ModalEditing
enum_values.summary: Render content supports editing in a modal editor. OBSOLETE: All contents support modal editing.

enum_values.name: DynamicFields
enum_values.summary: The render content's fields are dynamic. OBSOLETE: Dynamic fields can co-exist with static fields.
